_comment: Veilborn skill tree definitions. Prerequisites use skill IDs. tree_position is [x, y] in UI grid.

heavy_strike.name: Heavy Strike
heavy_strike.description: A powerful overhead blow. Increases base melee damage.

combo_master.name: Combo Master
combo_master.description: Extends the combo chain by 1 step per rank. Hit harder the longer the chain.

parry_master.name: Parry Expert
parry_master.description: Extends the parry window by 0.05s per rank. Perfect parries restore stamina.

berserker_rage.name: Berserker's Rage
berserker_rage.description: Below 30% HP, attack speed and damage increase dramatically.

whirlwind.name: Whirlwind
whirlwind.description: Spin attack hitting all enemies within 3m. Short cooldown.

shield_bash.name: Shield Bash
shield_bash.description: Bash with your shield, staggering the target for 1.5s.

quick_reflexes.name: Quick Reflexes
quick_reflexes.description: Reduce dodge cooldown and increase i-frame duration.

dual_wield.name: Dual Wield
dual_wield.description: Equip a one-handed weapon in the off-hand. Off-hand deals 65% damage.

fireball.name: Fireball
fireball.description: Conjure a ball of flame that explodes on impact. Deals fire damage in an area.

frost_nova.name: Frost Nova
frost_nova.description: Freeze all nearby enemies solid for 2 seconds. Frozen targets take 50% more damage.

arcane_shield.name: Arcane Shield
arcane_shield.description: A barrier of magic absorbs damage. Breaks after absorbing enough hits.

chain_lightning.name: Chain Lightning
chain_lightning.description: A bolt that jumps between up to 5 nearby enemies. Stuns briefly.

mana_efficiency.name: Mana Efficiency
mana_efficiency.description: Reduces mana cost of all spells by 5% per rank.

summoning.name: Summon Familiar
summoning.description: Summon a magical familiar to assist in combat. Type depends on mana invested.

swift_shot.name: Swift Shot
swift_shot.description: Fire an arrow with reduced draw time. No damage penalty.

piercing_arrow.name: Piercing Arrow
piercing_arrow.description: Your arrow passes through multiple enemies in a line.

trap_mastery.name: Trap Mastery
trap_mastery.description: Place caltrops, snares, or explosive traps. More ranks unlock new trap types.

mining.name: Mining
mining.description: Improves mining yield and unlocks access to deeper ore veins.

woodcutting.name: Woodcutting
woodcutting.description: Increases log yield and unlocks rare wood types.

smithing.name: Smithing
smithing.description: Improves quality rolls when forging weapons and armor.

alchemy.name: Alchemy
alchemy.description: Brew more potent potions. Higher ranks unlock legendary recipes.

cooking.name: Cooking
cooking.description: Prepare food that provides powerful, lasting buffs.

second_wind.name: Second Wind
second_wind.description: Once per encounter, automatically recover 25% HP when you would die.

mountaineer.name: Mountaineer
mountaineer.description: Reduces stamina drain while climbing. Higher ranks enable wall-walking.

deep_diver.name: Deep Diver
deep_diver.description: Increases swim speed and underwater breath duration.

cartography.name: Cartography
cartography.description: Reveals more of the minimap as you explore. Marks points of interest automatically.

treasure_hunter.name: Treasure Hunter
treasure_hunter.description: Increases loot quality and gold drops from all sources.

blink.name: Blink
blink.description: Instantly teleport up to 8m in the direction you're facing. Short cooldown.

dragon_skin.name: Dragonhide
dragon_skin.description: Ancient technique that briefly hardens your skin. Reduces all damage taken.
